rule_metadata.name: php
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'php' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule php
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'php' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "php"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /php\s\-r\s.{0,1000}\$sock\=fsockopen\(.{0,1000}exec\(.{0,1000}\/bin\/sh\s\-i\s\<\&3\s\>\&3\s2\>\&3/

	condition:
		any of them
}
